name: @travelos/external-react
description: ESM-only re-export of the node_modules React instance. Server-external + ESM-only so Next must import() it natively — its 'react' import then resolves OUTSIDE Next's require hook, yielding the same React copy @react-pdf/renderer's pure-ESM dist uses. PDF element trees must be created with this copy or the PDF reconciler rejects them (React error #31).
